category_sources: Official GNU bc page says bc is an arbitrary precision numeric processing language and POSIX utility.
source_facts.description: Arbitrary precision numeric processing language.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page heading is GNU bc.
docs_sources: Official GNU bc page links the online manual for bc.
repo_sources: No official source-control repository URL was identified on the GNU bc page; it points to GNU source release downloads rather than a public SCM repository.
tags_sources: Official GNU page says bc is arbitrary precision and supports interactive execution.
